blocked_without_explicit_target.requires: Explicit live-storage target before daemon start, add, fetch, gateway checks, pinning, wallet use, paid storage, or durability claims.
Explicit target before repeated or broader public-network checks, persistent seed operation, external peer targeting, or stronger availability claims.
Disposable project-scoped key target before any new publish; explicit target before extra readback probes.
Disposable or keyless test-signing target before replacing synthetic provenance with verified signing evidence.
Separate explicit approval before paid storage, wallets, paid services, or spending.
Separate explicit approval before production/private personal keys are used for any protocol action.
Separate explicit approval before contacting specific people outside public project channels.
Evidence-specific approval and proof before durability, censorship-resistance, security, SLSA, broad availability, or production-readiness claims.
